scripts.dev: set ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1&& set TMP=.tmp&& set TEMP=.tmp&& astro dev
scripts.check: set ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1&& set TMP=.tmp&& set TEMP=.tmp&& astro check
scripts.build: npm run prepare:admin && set ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1&& set TMP=.tmp&& set TEMP=.tmp&& astro build
scripts.export:cv: set TMP=.tmp&& set TEMP=.tmp&& node scripts/export-cv.mjs
scripts.verify:downloads: set TMP=.tmp&& set TEMP=.tmp&& node scripts/verify-downloads.mjs
scripts.verify:public-safety: set TMP=.tmp&& set TEMP=.tmp&& node scripts/verify-public-safety.mjs
